name: Quick Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the salad oil in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until tender.
3. Stir in the cubed luncheon meat.
4. Add the kidney beans, salt, and chili powder.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover and let simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Makes 4-6 servings
